nodes.label: AI as research tool and copilot under security constraints
nodes.label_negative: AI as unrestricted code access tool
nodes.grounding_span: I have to use AI like it's Google instead of copy and pasting things in

nodes.label: AI as collaborative step-by-step partner
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to collaborate and build step by step and offer feedback as I go

nodes.label: AI usefulness for niche technical debugging
nodes.grounding_span: Scala is not a very Googleable programming language so AI really goes a long way to streamline my work

nodes.label: AI as threat to skill maintenance
nodes.label_negative: AI as tool requiring skilled operation
nodes.grounding_span: I will continue to keep these kinds of skills sharp because I will need to do so to ensure AI is able to perform adequately

nodes.label: AI as productivity accelerator in bureaucratic environment
nodes.label_negative: AI as irrelevant due to bureaucracy
nodes.grounding_span: It would be nice to see AI utilised to streamline these processes and push the boundaries of ambition

nodes.label: AI use as secretive or stigmatized
nodes.grounding_span: There's a reluctance to admit we use AI, it's often not talked about very openly

nodes.label: Efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: it's still far more efficient than scouring Google

nodes.label: Professional competence and control
nodes.grounding_span: I cannot permit AI to access the entire codebase

nodes.label: Personal enjoyment and creativity
nodes.grounding_span: The actual design, layout and presentation elements are enjoyable for me

nodes.label: Workplace acceptance and openness
nodes.grounding_span: I hope that my employment will look to explore ways to incorporate AI positively

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for debugging
nodes.grounding_span: Satisfied? Sure, when debugging errors and bugs that I haven't seen before

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for complex implementation
nodes.grounding_span: AI made so many assumptions that working with AI as I attempted to implement it actually slowed me down

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: I hope that my employment will look to explore ways to incorporate AI positively into our workday

nodes.label: Reluctance to admit AI use
nodes.grounding_span: There's a reluctance to admit we use AI

nodes.label: Hypothetical scenario construction and iterative refinement
nodes.grounding_span: write a hypothetical scenario that my ticket applies to as well as providing the context of my work environment

nodes.label: Domain-based task partitioning (enjoyable vs. mundane)
nodes.grounding_span: I love working through frontend or design tasks without the support of the model, although sometimes I'll turn to AI to speed up mundane processes
